Name: ScratchedPartsParam
Description: Handles Ironeye's Marking, such as damage and animations of characters

Fields.Name: Trigger Damage Rate
Fields.Description: How much percent health to remove when triggered

Fields.Name: Damage Amount to Trigger
Fields.Description: How much percent health must be removed to trigger

Fields.Name: Damage Taken Rate
Fields.Description: How much extra damage character takes when affected

Fields.Name: Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation to play when weak point triggers

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly Id
Fields.Description: Dummy poly the marking signal attaches to
